prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年物理类最低位次分别为 479→406→339→412→1730，前四年稳定在 339–479 名区间，2025 年因不限选科组（英语专业）大幅后移至 1730 名，属结构性异常波动；2025 年基准位次约 1730 名；2021–2024 年物理类计划均为 18 人，2025 年增至 21 人，2026 年计划 24 人，较 2025 年扩招 3 人（+14.3%），扩招幅度明显，对竞争有缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 北京大学医学部依托北京大学办学，985/211/双一流；北京大学软科主榜 2026 年排名第 2 位（全国顶尖），医学部虽未单独排名但整体层次极高；北京大学 2026 年声誉评价偏负面（涉及校园安全、录取断档等事件），但北大医学部作为独立招生代码受影响有限；抖音热度方面北京大学总排名第 3（高热），医学部未单独统计；未见投档断档记录；参照北京大学学科评估：临床医学 A、口腔医学 A、基础医学 A、药学 A+、护理学 A+，医学学科实力全国顶尖，对高分考生吸引力极强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 临床医学 2024 年热度推荐（偏热），口腔医学推荐（偏热），医学类专业整体报考热度持续高位；湖北省 2026 年考生总数约 39.37 万（较 2025 年略有增加），物理类考生按比例估算约 25.1 万人，竞争基数扩大；北京大学医学部位于北京（非本省），无本地招生倾斜；湖北省属华中地区，赴京报考意愿较强，医学类 跨省报考热度不减。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年位次异常后移（英语专业拉低）、2026 年扩招 14.3% 缓解竞争、医学类专业持续高热、考生总数微增等因素；考虑到 2025 年异常值不可持续、医学热度支撑位次前移，预测 2026 年物理类最低位次约 1848 名，区间 1626–2070 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were 479 → 406 → 339 → 412 → 1730 respectively. The first four years were stable in the 339–479 range, but in 2025, due to the unrestricted subject group (English major), it significantly dropped to 1730, a structural anomaly. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 1730. From 2021 to 2024, the Physics Category enrollment plan was 18 students each year, increasing to 21 in 2025, and planned at 24 for 2026, an increase of 3 students (+14.3%) compared to 2025. This expansion is significant and helps alleviate competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Peking University Health Science Center is affiliated with Peking University, a 985/211/Double First-Class institution. Peking University ranks 2nd nationally in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking (top-tier nationally). Although the Health Science Center is not separately ranked, its overall level is extremely high. In 2026, Peking University's reputation evaluation is somewhat negative (involving campus safety, admission gaps, etc.), but as an independent admission code, the Health Science Center is less affected. On Douyin (TikTok) popularity, Peking University ranks 3rd overall (high heat), while the Health Science Center is not separately tracked. No admission gap records were found. Referencing Peking University's discipline evaluations: Clinical Medicine A, Stomatology A, Basic Medicine A, Pharmacy A+, Nursing A+, indicating top-tier medical discipline strength, strongly attracting high-scoring students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Clinical Medicine was recommended as popular in 2024 (slightly hot), Stomatology recommended as popular (slightly hot), and medical majors overall maintain high application heat. In 2026, the total number of examinees in Hubei Province is approximately 393,700 (slightly increased from 2025), with Physics Category examinees estimated at about 251,000, expanding the competition base. Peking University Health Science Center is located in Beijing (not within the province), with no local admission preference. Hubei Province is in the Central China region, with a strong willingness to apply to Beijing, and cross-provincial application heat for medical majors remains undiminished.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the abnormal ranking drop in 2025 (pulled down by the English major), the 14.3% enrollment expansion in 2026 alleviating competition, the sustained high heat of medical majors, and a slight increase in total examinees; given that the 2025 anomaly is unsustainable and medical heat supports ranking recovery, the predicted minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 is approximately 1848, with a range of 1626–2070.

- Basic Medicine (Direct Bachelor-Doctor, 8-year program).

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking 1848, range 1626–2070. For rankings within the range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (5-year Clinical/Stomatology, Pharmacy Bachelor-Master) as the main direction, with Tier 1 8-year programs as a sprint. For rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 1626), focus on sprinting for Tier 1 direct Bachelor-Doctor programs. For rankings near the upper limit of the range (around 2070), it is recommended to use Tier 3 majors as a safety net.
